basic_details.short_information: National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Consultant. Candidates with Master's Degree, M.Phil or Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 18-05-2026, and closes on 07-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NDMA official website ndma.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Disaster Management, M.Phil or Ph.D in Disaster Management (Desirable)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NDMA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: NDMA Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Lead Consultant and Senior Consultant Posts
